author: parithosh
content: We'd like to have a small scale devnet next week and a public one ~16th Jan. So I guess based on ACD this week we can discuss scope for both? (Ideally same scope for both)

content:
I can have that implemented by end of the day but I probably wont want to merge it to capella until spec test

author: sauliusgrigaitis
content: Where could I find detailed geth setup instructions for withdrawals-devnet-1?

author: mariusvanderwijden
content: no special instructions needed, just init with the correct genesis `geth init genesis.json` and run

author: sauliusgrigaitis
content: thanks, which geth branch should I use?

author: arnetheduck
content: how does it work with bootnodes / discovery btw? it uses the same dht as mainnet?

author: potuz
content: Bootnodes you need to specify from the above configuration repo

author: mariusvanderwijden
content: For anyone stumped why geth doesn't connect peers, you also need to set --networkid to connect
